hooks.command: set -o pipefail && cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR && bun run typecheck 2>&1 | tail -5
set -o pipefail && cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR && bun run typecheck 2>&1 | tail -5
set -o pipefail && cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR && bun run typecheck 2>&1 | tail -10 && echo 'Typecheck passed' || (echo 'BLOCKED: typecheck failed — fix type errors before committing' >&2; exit 2)

set -o pipefail && cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR && (bun run typecheck 2>&1 | tail -5) && (bun test 2>&1 | tail -10) && echo 'All checks passed' || (echo 'BLOCKED: tests or typecheck failed — fix before pushing' >&2; exit 2)
